land.title: Land Intelligence
land.subtitle: Satellite & Drone Analysis for Land Size and Valuation
land.uploadSubtitle: Drag and drop or click to browse
land.uploadToSee: Upload an image to see predicted size and value
land.disclaimer: Analysis based on vegetation density index (NDVI) and image metadata scaling. Valuation is an estimate based on local market averages.
land.step1: Download PDF report for land title documentation.
land.step2: Connect with your nearest Agronomist for valuation certification.
land.step3: Apply for land-based subsidies based on verified size.

responses.default: I'm your AgriFlux AI! Ask me about crop yield, irrigation, soil health, climate risk, pests, subsidies, or drones.
responses.greeting: 👋 Hi! I'm AgriFlux AI. Ask me anything about farming, crops, or climate!
responses.yield: For optimal yield, ensure your soil NPK levels are balanced. Rice yields 3,500-5,000 kg/ha under good conditions.
responses.irrigation: Irrigation should be based on crop requirements and soil moisture. Rice needs 450-700mm per season.
responses.soil: Healthy soil holds pH 6-7, solid NPK, and >1.5% organic carbon. Add compost regularly.
responses.climate: Climate change increases drought risks. Use the Simulator to plan, and consider resilient crop varieties.
responses.fertilizer: Apply NPK based on soil tests. Split applications improve uptake efficiency by 20-30%.
responses.weather: Always plan irrigation around 7-day rainfall forecasts to save water and prevent runoff.
responses.sustainability: Farm sustainability measures fertilizer efficiency, water use, and soil health. Aim for >70 score.
responses.pests: Common pests like aphids and borers can be managed with integrated pest management (IPM) and neem oil.
responses.diseases: Fungal diseases spread quickly in high humidity. Ensure good spacing and use preventive bio-fungicides.
responses.market: Market prices fluctuate. Check the Market Analysis tab before harvesting to time your sale effectively.
responses.msp: The Minimum Support Price (MSP) is the guaranteed government price. Always compare local mandi rates to MSP.
responses.subsidies: The government offers subsidies for solar pumps, drip irrigation, and organic seeds. Check the Subsidies tab.
responses.drones: Agricultural drones can spray fertilizers 10x faster and help identify pest hotspots via multispectral imaging.
responses.satellites: Satellite imagery (NDVI) helps assess land vigor, predict yields, and verify farm size for loans.
responses.loans: Kisan Credit Cards (KCC) offer low-interest farming loans. Satellite verification speeds up approval.
responses.organic: Organic farming eliminates chemical costs and builds long-term soil carbon. Start transitioning incrementally.
responses.weeds: Manage weeds early before they compete for nutrients. Mulching and cover crops naturally suppress weed growth.
responses.harvest: Harvest at the correct moisture content (e.g., 14% for wheat) to prevent post-harvest fungal losses.
responses.storage: Store grains in cool, dry, well-ventilated silos or hermetic bags to prevent weevil infestations.
responses.machinery: Renting tractors or combine harvesters via local cooperatives is often more cost-effective than purchasing.
responses.livestock: Integrating livestock with crops creates a circular farm economy where manure acts as free fertilizer.
responses.seeds: Always use certified, high-yielding variety (HYV) seeds treated with fungicides for the best germination rates.
responses.insurance: Crop insurance (like PMFBY) protects against weather anomalies. Register before the sowing season begins.
